---
name: Proposal
about: Propose a new agent, skill, command, hook, rule, or workflow.
title: "[proposal] "
labels: proposal
---

## What's the gap

<What does SOMI not currently do? What pain does that cause?>

## Proposed addition

<New agent / new skill / new command / new hook / new rule / new workflow — and a sketch of its shape.>

## Why it belongs upstream (vs. in your local overrides)

<Would another team's SOMI install benefit? If this is project-specific, it probably belongs in
your own `99-overrides.md` or a project-local plugin instead.>

## Alternatives considered

<Two or three options you thought about and why you picked the one you're proposing.>

## Compatibility

- Is this additive (MINOR), breaking (MAJOR), or a fix (PATCH)?
- Does it require a deprecation cycle for anything that exists today?

## References

<Links to docs, prior art, related issues.>
